prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025 年该科类最低位次约 2692→2089→14232→4874，其中 2024 年出现异常大幅后移（断档信号），2025 年已明显回升至 4874 名，近两年波动剧烈；2025 年基准位次约 4874 名；本省招生计划 2022–2024 年分别为 54、54、56 人，2025 年（物理类）为 52 人；2026 年计划增至 60 人，较 2025 年扩招约 15.4%，扩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜约第 84 名，近年排名稳定在 75–84 区间，属于全国知名的电力特色强校；该校在声誉监测文件中未出现明显负面或正面事件，舆情平稳；抖音热度未进入全国前 106 名，短视频曝光度一般，未出现异常关注信号；电气工程（A）、动力工程及工程热物理（A-），均为全国领先水平，与招生专业中的电气工程及其自动化、能 源与动力工程等高度对应，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化在 2024 年专业热度分析中被评为「高热推荐」，能源动力类专业亦为「推荐」，社会关注度持续升温；宁夏 2026 年高考总人数约 66000 人（不确定），按近年物理类占比约 67.5% 估算约 44500 人，与 2025 年基本持平，考生规模未明显变化；该校位于河北保定，属华北地区，距宁夏较远；在宁夏招生计划占比较小（约 60 人），地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次回升至 4874 名的基准、2026 年大幅扩招约 15.4% 使竞争缓解（位次数字增大），以及电气类专业持续高热吸引更多考生报考（部分抵消扩招效应）；预测 2026 年最低位次约 5274 名，区间 4774–5774 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 4774–5774 名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<4774 名）可重点冲击电气工程及其自动化等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>5774 名）建议以三档专业保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for this subject category was approximately 2692→2089→14232→4874, with an abnormal large backward shift in 2024 (signaling a gap), and a significant recovery to 4874 in 2025, showing drastic fluctuations in recent two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4874; the provincial enrollment plan from 2022 to 2024 was 54, 54, and 56 respectively, and 52 for 2025 (Physics Category); the plan for 2026 increases to 60, an expansion of about 15.4% compared to 2025, which theoretically eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 84th on the Soft Science main list, with stable rankings in the 75–84 range in recent years, known nationwide as a strong university with electric power characteristics; no significant negative or positive events appeared in reputation monitoring documents, with stable public opinion; Douyin popularity did not enter the top 106 nationally, with general short video exposure and no abnormal attention signals; Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-) are both at the national leading level, highly corresponding to majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation, Energy and Power Engineering, etc., strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation was rated as 'highly recommended' in the 2024 major popularity analysis, and Energy and Power majors were also 'recommended', with continuously rising social attention; the total number of Ningxia Gaokao candidates in 2026 is about 66,000 (uncertain), estimated at about 44,500 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 67.5%, roughly unchanged from 2025; the university is located in Baoding, Hebei, in North China, far from Ningxia; the enrollment plan in Ningxia is relatively small (about 60 people), with limited regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline ranking of 4874 in 2025, the significant expansion of about 15.4% in 2026 easing competition (increasing ranking number), and the sustained high popularity of electrical majors attracting more candidates (partially offsetting the expansion effect); the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 5274, with a range of 4774–5774.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4774–5774, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<4774), you can focus on Tier 1 flagship majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>5774), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety options.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次缓慢后移趋势、2026 年招生计划持平、文科专业与学校工科优势关联度低等因素；预测 2026 年最低位次约 1312 名，区间 984–1640 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for this subject category was approximately 1054→1202→1124→1282, showing a gradual backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 228 places over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 1282; the provincial enrollment plan was 6 students from 2022 to 2024, reduced to 5 in 2025 (History Category); the 2026 plan remains at 5, with enrollment scale unchanged for two consecutive years, having limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 84th on the Soft Science main list, with stable rankings in recent years; no significant negative or positive events were found in reputation monitoring documents, with stable public opinion; Douyin popularity is average, with no abnormal attention signals; Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-) are both engineering advantages, but have no direct disciplinary connection with History Category majors (Law, Administrative Management, Social Work, Foreign Language and Literature), thus limited appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among History Category majors, Law has a social popularity rating of 'Recommended' but with competitive differentiation, while Foreign Language and Literature has a social popularity rating of 'Generally Wait-and-See'; Ningxia's total number of Gaokao candidates in 2026 is about 66,000 (uncertain), estimated at about 21,400 based on the recent History Category proportion of about 32.5%, roughly the same as 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the gradual backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the low correlation between liberal arts majors and the university's engineering strengths; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 1312, with a range of 984–1640.
